# Cimd.Parse method

Parses a CIMD document, returning `null` when it is not a JSON object with the REQUIRED `client_id`, `client_name`, and non-empty `redirect_uris` (R-23.4-f).

```csharp
public static ClientIdMetadataDocument? Parse(JsonNode? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The raw fetched document, or `null`. |

## Return Value

The parsed document, or `null` when invalid.
